page_metadata.biotools__summary: Sampling-based protein complex prediction method, which exploits, as part of the whole scoring function, a regularization term for the overlaps of predicted complexes and that for the distribution of sizes of predicted complexes.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Sampling-based protein complex prediction method, which exploits, as part of the whole scoring function, a regularization term for the overlaps of predicted complexes and that for the distribution of sizes of predicted complexes.
